title: Arent they so cute
wikitext:
[]: Aren't they so cute             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Nov 17, 2005 3:07 pm I think that the Mass Production Evangelions are really cute, i don't know why I think this but i do. Does anyone else think I'm crazy or agree with me on thier cuteness?

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Thu Nov 17, 2005 3:32 pm They make me giggle. Especially when I doodle them on other peoples papers, like the kid who sits next to me in art. 'cept they dont really look like evas anymore. More like flies. Hell yes.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Nov 17, 2005 3:35 pm Now they werent so cute while eating Eva 02 but in general i love their heads, mah friend made me a chibi mass production eva doll for X mas it is soooo cute

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Nov 17, 2005 3:35 pm I saw a fan word one were Hikari was a pilot and she has one of those. She though it looked ugly so thry put big pink bows on it . That was funny to see.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Nov 17, 2005 3:37 pm thats sounds pretty funny, I can't picture a MPE wearing anything pink lol

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Thu Nov 17, 2005 3:42 pm Cute...? Maybe you should talk to Ryousanki aka Treize X. He hasn't been here for ages, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Thu Nov 17, 2005 3:43 pm If you consider an albino version of an Alien to be cute then yes.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Nov 17, 2005 3:44 pm You don't think they are cute?

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Thu Nov 17, 2005 3:48 pm DatDude wrote: I saw a fan word one were Hikari was a pilot and she has one of those. She though it looked ugly so thry put big pink bows on it . That was funny to see.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Nov 17, 2005 3:59 pm Sorry nope.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Nov 17, 2005 4:20 pm Space Penis wrote: DatDude wrote: I saw a fan word one were Hikari was a pilot and she has one of those. She though it looked ugly so thry put big pink bows on it . That was funny to see.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Thu Nov 17, 2005 4:47 pm How...perfectly odd.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Nov 17, 2005 5:43 pm Thats the pic thank you Tines. One of these days I need to make an avy out of that one.

[]:             Quote Post by xiuxiu » Thu Nov 17, 2005 6:26 pm jesus they scare me

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Nov 17, 2005 11:00 pm I think you're blind or crazy if you think the MP Evasare cute. Cool maybe, cute no.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Fri Nov 18, 2005 2:48 am Whenever I see them I want to eat watermelons. And no, they're not cute. But when I first saw them with my friend, hilarity ensued. We managed to laugh for a god 30 minutes without having to resort to sexual innuendos to do so.

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Fri Nov 18, 2005 2:53 pm Eternal Yamcha wrote: Whenever I see them I want to eat watermelons.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Nov 18, 2005 2:56 pm rb_182_ wrote: Eternal Yamcha wrote: Whenever I see them I want to eat watermelons.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Nov 18, 2005 2:56 pm Mr. Tines wrote: The thing being referred to is called Hikari the Sixth, and it was scanned out of something that looked like an official Gainax artwork book.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Nov 18, 2005 3:55 pm could anyone help me find a decent picture of the MPE please

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Thu Nov 17, 2005 3:32 pm They make me giggle. Especially when I doodle them
